explicit_text: I was born in Oklahoma City on May 15, 1948, and much of my life and career has been rooted here. My family moved here from Cleveland, Oklahoma, and I attended schools like Nichols Hills Elementary and Casady School in Oklahoma City. Later, I served as the Ward 2 City Councilman and Vice Mayor here before becoming a Corporation Commissioner.

I started working there as a child, doing chores and working in stores during summers and holidays. I became more involved full-time around 1974 and eventually served as Chairman of the Board until the company was sold in 1987.

He moved to Indian Territory at a young age and built a legacy that shaped my family and career.
